task_objective: Fix selectedHistory.reason displaying raw reason keys instead of user-friendly messages in the Last Operation UI section
design_decisions: Added optional third parameter 'message' to getLastOperationText instead of changing the existing signature
Used a switch block inside the 'skipped' case to translate all known reason keys to human-readable descriptions consistent with summarizeOperationResult
For 'failed' status, prioritized message over reason with fallback to generic 'check logs' text
Also recovered from accidental rebase by aborting and re-applying fix cleanly on a new branch from main
results: All 246 tests pass. ruff check, ruff format, ty check, tsc typecheck, and rollup build all succeed.
